Stackpole]] |penciller=[[Carlos Ezquerra]] |inker=[[Carlos Ezquerra]] |letterer=[[Michael Taylor]] |colorist=[[James Sinclair]] |cover artist=[[Kilian Plunkett]] |editor=[[Peet Janes]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[July 26]], [[1998]]{{SWArchive|url=mara|text=Star Wars: Mara Jade - Issue 0}} |end date=[[September 29]], [[1999]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/97-289/Star-Wars-Tales-1|text=Star Wars Tales #1}} |schedule= |format= |issues=6 |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]Date established in narrative text. |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand''''' was a six-issue series of comics published between [[1998]] and [[1999]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" align="center" width="33%" |Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" align="center" width="33%" |Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" align="center" width="33%" |Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
